title: BABY TOWN Personalised Baby Comforter and Blanket Set Beautiful Keepsake Gift for Baby (Personalised Pink Elephant Toy and Pink Personalised Elephant Patterned Blanket), Crib
features: PERSONALISED Gorgeous Newbaby gift comprising of the softest fluffy baby blanket and a cute baby comforter in a choice of designs
TWO OPTIONS- Just the comforter personalised or BOTH Personalised DEPENDING ON THE VARIATION YOU CHOOSE above
Teamed with blanket is a lovely comfort blankie so cute and soft, it will become babies favourite little take to bed toy

The embroidery will be customised with your choice of name and or date of birth up to 20 characters - the colour choice is D=dark silver grey but we will accomadate colour changes to Pink or blue if you email us.
Available in 70 x 90cm, these versatile blankets are perfect for using in cribs/prams/Moses baskets
description: This adorable baby gift can be made extra special as you will be able to personalise your name and even add date of birth to create a wonderful little keepsake. Gorgeous Banket and baby elephant comforter Set which would make an ideal baby shower gift. The set is for a soft blanket made from cloud-soft fluffy fleece material which would make a fabulous crib carrycot or bassinet blanket. The accompanying toy is an elephant or a giraffe comforter which can be blue pink or white.
